query: What's our PM-vs-CM cost ratio for Q3?
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-maintenance-cost with maximo-overview as parent
Distinguishes PM-generated WOs by WORKORDER.PMNUM IS NOT NULL (NOT by WORKTYPE='PM' alone — those are different concepts)
Filters to WOs completed (STATUS IN ('COMP','CLOSE')) in Q3
Sums labor + material actual cost for both numerator and denominator
